name: Neem Leaves
description: Cornerstone tree of traditional medicine. AZADIRACHTIN compounds exhibit potent anti-insecticidal properties, disrupting vector larval development.
preparation: Topical leaf oil applied as mosquito repellent, or leaf smudge burning to clear vector flies.
safetyAlert: Strongly contraindicated in pregnancy (potent abortifacient). Oral Neem seed oil is toxic in children, causing liver damage.
interactions: May lower blood sugar; check glucose when taking pharmaceutical antidiabetics.

demographicCautions.title: EXTREME ALERT: Neem is contraindicated in pregnancy
demographicCautions.message: Scientific research confirms Neem leaf extracts have potent abortifacient properties and can stimulate uterine contractions, causing miscarriage. Do not ingest under any circumstances during pregnancy.

demographicCautions.title: CRITICAL ALERT: Neem seed oil hepatotoxicity
demographicCautions.message: Documented clinical cases show oral consumption of Neem seed oil in infants causes toxic encephalopathy, mitochondrial damage, and severe Reye-like syndrome. Never administer internally.
